properties.description: Character encoding / serialization of the structured document (e.g., utf-8, application/json). CDIF simplification (plain charset string) of DDI-CDI PhysicalDataSet.encoding, whose model type is ControlledVocabularyEntry. The cdi/cdif namespace policy does not allow a ControlledVocabularyEntry as a plain string in the cdi namespace, so this property is in the cdif namespace.
